name: Primary Concept
prompt: Design a combination mark logo with icon and text, balanced composition for "AgencyCyberInsurance", a finance company. Style: professional trust authority clean. Colors: #1B2A4A. Concept: Shield or lock combined with digital network nodes representing cyber protection. Clean geometric style, works at small sizes. Symbol only, no text.. White background, vector-style, high contrast, scalable design. Professional logo design.

name: Minimal Variant
prompt: Minimalist logo for "AgencyCyberInsurance" (finance). Ultra-clean, simple geometric shapes, professional trust authority clean feel. White background, single color, works at small sizes. Professional logo design.

name: Bold Variant
prompt: Bold, modern logo for "AgencyCyberInsurance" (finance). Strong presence, professional trust authority clean aesthetic. Using #1B2A4A. White background, impactful design, memorable silhouette. Professional logo design.

name: Icon Only
prompt: Abstract icon/symbol for a finance brand called "AgencyCyberInsurance". Mood: professional trust authority clean. Geometric, distinctive, works as app icon or favicon. White background, single shape, professional logo mark.
